title: Earthy Crunchy Garlic Italian Stir-fry
description: A festive Italian dish featuring garlic, red chili flakes, and earthy flavors that are perfect for a light dinner or snack.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic cloves, red chili flakes, and Italian herbs.
Stir-fry for about 2 minutes until fragrant but not burnt.
Add salt to taste based on preference or dish requirements.
Drain rice noodles and add them directly into the pan with the garlic mixture, stirring well to coat evenly.
Fold in pitted cherry peppers and stir-fry briefly to heat through.
For a creamy texture, mix in a tablespoon of prepared garlic butter sauce base if desired. Stir until fully combined.
Serve hot as is or garnish with extra herbs for visual appeal.
